records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything's blowing up all over the place. It's chaos.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything's blowing up all over the place. It's chaos.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything's blowing up all over the place. It's chaos.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't stare at it for too long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't stare at it for too long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't stare at it for too long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even photos can still mess with your head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even photos can still mess with your head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even photos can still mess with your head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's the Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's the Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's the Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I imagined the Demon Lord as something with a more tangible form.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I imagined the Demon Lord as something with a more tangible form.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I imagined the Demon Lord as something with a more tangible form.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Demon Lord isn't a living being. It's more like a phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Demon Lord isn't a living being. It's more like a phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Demon Lord isn't a living being. It's more like a phenomenon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...To a Demon Lord, a physical body is nothing more than a vessel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...To a Demon Lord, a physical body is nothing more than a vessel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...To a Demon Lord, a physical body is nothing more than a vessel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It better not be what I think it is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It better not be what I think it is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It better not be what I think it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You anticipated my attack. Impressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You anticipated my attack. Impressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You anticipated my attack. Impressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *...Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *...Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *...Cough* *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ever heard of sensing killing intent? It's basic Orthodox Sect training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ever heard of sensing killing intent? It's basic Orthodox Sect training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ever heard of sensing killing intent? It's basic Orthodox Sect training.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know, you look exactly like that Shadow that was supposedly exterminated before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know, you look exactly like that Shadow that was supposedly exterminated before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know, you look exactly like that Shadow that was supposedly exterminated before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The name was... Ministra, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The name was... Ministra, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The name was... Ministra, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each time the world turns, a new sister is born. She was merely one of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each time the world turns, a new sister is born. She was merely one of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each time the world turns, a new sister is born. She was merely one of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how many of our sisters you humans destroy, it is nothing but meaningless resistance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how many of our sisters you humans destroy, it is nothing but meaningless resistance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how many of our sisters you humans destroy, it is nothing but meaningless resistance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're fine pairing words that cold with something as precious as "sister"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're fine pairing words that cold with something as precious as "sister"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're fine pairing words that cold with something as precious as "sister"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or are "sisters" nothing more than expendable tools to someone like you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or are "sisters" nothing more than expendable tools to someone like you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or are "sisters" nothing more than expendable tools to someone like you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fate is a curse. Our queen freed us from it, so we merely repay her will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fate is a curse. Our queen freed us from it, so we merely repay her will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fate is a curse. Our queen freed us from it, so we merely repay her will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So blocking our path was also her command?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So blocking our path was also her command?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So blocking our path was also her command?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means your queen is in the direction we're heading.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means your queen is in the direction we're heading.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means your queen is in the direction we're heading.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to know.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You'll die here anyway
8g

You'll die here anyway
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional ship?

records.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional ship?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Plasma cannon hit confirmed on unidentified hostile!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not even moving, and it's unharmed?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not even moving, and it's unharmed?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not even moving, and it's unharmed?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Foolish. You rush toward your end, unable to grasp the gap by sight alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Foolish. You rush toward your end, unable to grasp the gap by sight alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Foolish. You rush toward your end, unable to grasp the gap by sight alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All crew, brace for impact...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All crew, brace for impact...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible. A dimensional ship, destroyed with a single gesture...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible. A dimensional ship, destroyed with a single gesture...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible. A dimensional ship, destroyed with a single gesture...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the one that crashed earlier was also its doing?

records.m_Talk_FRA: So the one that crashed earlier was also its doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Minha, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Minha, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Target presumed to be a Shadow-type entity spotted. Engaging.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Target presumed to be a Shadow-type entity spotted. Engaging.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. Someone like you should know how this ends for these ignorant fools.
